creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 244200
Patch for gnustep-base

Backport upstream commit 37913d006d96a6bdcb963f4ca4889888dcce6094 to fix build with newer versions of libxml2

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 12.4-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.2-RELEASE (amd64)

Reference:
https://github.com/gnustep/libs-base/commit/37913d006d96a6bdcb963f4ca4889888dcce6094
